name: story-os-workspace
description: File-first, multi-novel Story OS with validation and mobile reading tools.

scripts.build:reader-app: npm run build:reader-data -- --profile internal --output .generated/reader/library.json && vite build --config app/mobile-reader/vite.config.ts
scripts.dev:reader-app: npm run build:reader-data -- --profile internal --output .generated/reader/library.json && vite --config app/mobile-reader/vite.config.ts --host 127.0.0.1
scripts.open:reader: npm run build:reader-app && vite preview --config app/mobile-reader/vite.config.ts --host 127.0.0.1 --open
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run validate:story
